summary: The Balfour Kitchen & Bar has an existing website, and the strongest useful gap is: visual proof is under-explained.
outreachHook: I noticed your site has a fixable conversion gap: Few captured images include descriptive alt text or proof context.
openDesignDirection: The Balfour Kitchen & Bar should feel like the obvious restaurant choice in Brisbane. Use before/after or job-site proof with descriptive captions and useful alt text. Add a proof section with real reviews, project examples, and verified guarantees/credentials. Rewrite title around "restaurant Breakfast restaurant" while keeping the business name.

captured.title: The Balfour Kitchen & Bar | Worlds Apart

findings.title: Visual proof is under-explained
findings.evidence: Few captured images include descriptive alt text or proof context.
findings.impact: Before/after, team, and job-site proof may not transfer trust quickly.
findings.fix: Use before/after or job-site proof with descriptive captions and useful alt text.

findings.title: Trust signal is not strong in the first screen
findings.evidence: The first captured text block does not clearly surface reviews, warranty, credentials, years, or local proof.
findings.impact: For local services, trust often matters before design polish.
findings.fix: Add a compact trust strip near the hero: reviews, warranty/licence claims when verified, service area, and response promise.

findings.title: Social proof channels are missing
findings.evidence: No visible Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, X, or WhatsApp link was captured.
findings.impact: Visual or review-heavy businesses lose an easy trust path.
findings.fix: Add verified social links or replace with stronger on-page testimonials/gallery proof.

findings.title: Proof is not doing enough work
findings.evidence: The captured text does not clearly surface reviews, project proof, warranty, licences, or gallery proof.
findings.impact: The site may feel informational rather than convincing.
findings.fix: Add a proof section with real reviews, project examples, and verified guarantees/credentials.

checks.title: The Balfour Kitchen & Bar | Worlds Apart
checks.metaDescription: In the heart of New Farm, The Balfour Kitchen & Bar offers a dining experience that transitions seamlessly from relaxed daytime gatherings to intimate evening occasions.

og.title: The Balfour Kitchen & Bar
og.description: In the heart of New Farm, The Balfour Kitchen & Bar offers a dining experience that transitions seamlessly from relaxed daytime gatherings to intimate evening occasions.

twitter.title: The Balfour Kitchen & Bar
twitter.description: In the heart of New Farm, The Balfour Kitchen & Bar offers a dining experience that transitions seamlessly from relaxed daytime gatherings to intimate evening occasions.

findings.title: Title does not target the main local intent
findings.evidence: Captured title: "The Balfour Kitchen & Bar | Worlds Apart". Inferred keyword: "restaurant Breakfast restaurant".
findings.impact: The page may rank or click worse for the service/location query we care about.
findings.fix: Rewrite title around "restaurant Breakfast restaurant" while keeping the business name.

findings.title: Meta description is too generic for the lead angle
findings.evidence: Captured meta description does not clearly include "restaurant Breakfast restaurant" or a close variant.
findings.impact: The search snippet may not match high-intent local searches.
findings.fix: Mention service, location, and a concrete result or quote action.

findings.title: H1 misses the main local intent
findings.evidence: Captured H1: "The Balfour Kitchen & Bar". Inferred keyword: "restaurant Breakfast restaurant".
findings.impact: Visitors and search engines may not see the core service immediately.
findings.fix: Make the H1 naturally cover "restaurant Breakfast restaurant" or a close variant.

findings.title: Internal linking is weak
findings.evidence: 0 internal link(s) captured.
findings.impact: Important pages may be harder to discover and preserve during redesign.
findings.fix: Link to services, contact/quote, about/proof, and relevant location pages.

findings.title: Image alt text is weak
findings.evidence: 45 image(s) missing alt attribute and 1 image(s) have empty alt.
findings.impact: Images do not help accessibility, local proof, or image-search context.
findings.fix: Add descriptive alt text for content images; keep decorative images empty intentionally.

findings.title: Structured data is missing
findings.evidence: No JSON-LD schema types were captured.
findings.impact: LocalBusiness schema can make core business facts clearer to search engines.
findings.fix: Add LocalBusiness/Organization schema with verified name, phone, area, URL, and social links.
